title: Pediatric Surgeons
description: Diagnose and perform surgery to treat fetal abnormalities and birth defects, diseases, and injuries in fetuses, premature and newborn infants, children, and adolescents. Includes all pediatric surgical specialties and subspecialties.

tasks.text: Analyze patient's medical history, medication allergies, physical condition, and examination results to verify operation's necessity and to determine best procedure.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to develop and test surgical techniques that can improve operating procedures and outcomes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with patient's other medical care specialists, such as cardiologist and endocrinologist, to determine if surgery is necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Describe preoperative and postoperative treatments and procedures, such as sedatives, diets, antibiotics, or preparation and treatment of the patient's operative area, to parents or guardians of the patient.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate activities of nurses, assistants, specialists, residents, and other medical staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine fetuses, infants, children, and adolescents, and diagnose health issues to determine need for intervention, such as surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine instruments, equipment, and operating room to ensure sterility.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine patient to obtain information on medical condition and surgical risk.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Follow established surgical techniques during the operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform parents and guardians of child's health problems and surgical procedures through various channels, such as in-person and telecommunication systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret results of preoperative tests and physical examinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage surgery services, including planning, scheduling and coordination, determination of procedures, or procurement of supplies and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor patient's recovery, making follow-up visits and using postoperative assessment techniques, such as blood and imaging tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate on fetuses, infants, children, and adolescents to correct deformities, repair injuries, prevent and treat diseases, or improve or restore patients' functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform transplantation operations, such as organ transplants, on fetuses, infants, children, and adolescents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide consultation and surgical assistance to other physicians and surgeons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer patient to medical specialist or other practitioners when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
